ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU utilization, Total requests) */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter for the metric (e.g., cpu_util, proxy_commands) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., %, requests/second) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the metric is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  "default_threshold" REAL /* Default threshold value for the metric */,
  "default_operator" TEXT /* Default operator for the threshold (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the value belongs to */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the value was collected from */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was collected */,
  "is_anomalous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the metric value is considered anomalous */,
  "anomaly_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the anomaly if the value is marked as anomalous */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric value was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the server */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the server is currently active */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (e.g., running, maintenance, down) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the server was added to the monitoring system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the server's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the widget displays */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the widget is currently visible on the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was added to the dashboard */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the alert is for */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the alert (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email address to send notifications to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS, webhook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, DevOps, support) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's details */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the API key is active */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use of the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
